meaning: n.班柯(莎士比亚悲剧<<麦克佩斯>>中人物,被麦克佩斯下令杀死,后以鬼魂显灵,使麦克佩斯暴露自己的罪行)
examples: Hilton is building its own hotel there, which you may be sure will be decorated with Hamlet Hamburger Bars, the Lear Lounge, the Banquo Banqueting Room, and so forth ,and will be very expensive.
So all hail, Macbeth and Banquo!
'Not quite, ' replied Jo modestly. 'I do think THE WITCHES CURSE, an Operatic Tragedy is rather a nice thing, but I'd like to try McBETH, if we only had a trapdoor for Banquo.
